STAR_LIGHT_POWER.title: StarLight
STAR_LIGHT_POWER.description: At the end of this combat, gain Gold equal to this power's amount.
STAR_LIGHT_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of this combat, gain Gold equal to this power's amount.
SWORD_AURA_POWER.title: Sword Aura
SWORD_AURA_POWER.description: The first 2 stacks each make your attacks deal 1 extra damage. The 3rd stack makes your attacks deal 2 extra damage. Maximum 3 stacks.
SWORD_AURA_POWER.smartDescription: The first 2 stacks each make your attacks deal 1 extra damage. The 3rd stack makes your attacks deal 2 extra damage. Maximum 3 stacks.
